nasb.text: Then our mouth was filled with laughter And our tongue with joyful shouting; Then they said among the nations, “The Lord has done great things for them.”

esv.text: Then our mouth was filled with laughter, and our tongue with shouts of joy; then they said among the nations, “The Lord has done great things for them.”

cnv.text: 那時，我們滿口喜笑， 滿舌歡呼； 那時列國中有人說： “耶和華為他們行了大事。”

ccb.text: 我们笑声不止，欢呼歌唱。 列邦都说： “耶和华为他们成就了伟大的事。”

csbs.text: 那时我们的口充满欢笑， 我们的舌头充满欢呼； 人们在列国中说： “耶和华为他们行了大事！”
